globalNotFound.title: This route could not be found
globalNotFound.description: The requested screen either moved or has not been provisioned yet. Return to household selection and continue from a valid workspace.

householdNotFound.title: Household not found
householdNotFound.description: The requested household could not be resolved from the current workspace dataset. Choose another household to continue.

householdError.title: The household workspace could not be assembled
householdError.description: The shell stayed intact, but this route segment failed to render. Retry the segment or return to household selection.

dashboard.description: All information about your household accounts lives in the sections below.
dashboard.notificationsUnavailable: Notification center is not available in this phase.
dashboard.cashDescription: Available household cash across your active operating surfaces.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.description: Compact account cards shaped for scanability and fast action.
wallet.errorDescription: The account preview could not be loaded for this household right now.
wallet.emptyDescription: Connected household accounts will appear here after the first account is created or synced.

activity.title: Transactions
activity.description: Latest mapped household activity across cards, bank accounts, and internal transfers.
activity.errorDescription: The latest household transactions could not be assembled right now.
activity.emptyDescription: Recent transaction activity will appear here once the household records expense, income, or transfer entries.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.errorDescription: The analytics summary could not be loaded for this household right now.
statistics.emptyDescription: Analytics preview cards will become available once the household has enough recorded financial activity.

quickTransfer.title: Quick transfer
quickTransfer.description: Start from a live account surface without leaving the overview.
quickTransfer.errorDescription: The overview could not load active transfer surfaces for this household right now.
quickTransfer.readOnlyTitle: Transfer actions are limited for this role
quickTransfer.readOnlyDescription: This membership can review balances and activity, but initiating household money movement requires a higher permission scope.
quickTransfer.emptyDescription: Create or reconnect at least one active household account to unlock transfer shortcuts and destination suggestions.

actionCenter.title: Quick actions
actionCenter.description: Open product-grade finance forms directly from the overview. Mutations use same-origin BFF handlers, idempotency keys, and route refresh after success.
actionCenter.errorDescription: The dashboard could not prepare mutation references for this household.
actionCenter.readOnly: This membership can review balances and activity, but mutation flows are hidden because the role is read-only.

requirements.twoActiveAccounts: Needs at least two active accounts
requirements.noOpenDebts: No open debt is ready for settlement

settlement.label: Settle debt
settlement.description: Record a partial or full settlement

budget.label: Budget limit
budget.description: Create or update a category cap

stats.budgetDescription: Category caps stay aligned with household-scoped expenses after each refresh.

expense.title: Record expense
expense.description: Post a new household expense against an active account and category.

income.title: Record income
income.description: Post a new household inflow into an active account.

transfer.title: Create transfer
transfer.description: Move available balance between two household accounts.

debt.title: Create debt
debt.description: Track a payable or receivable without leaving the dashboard overview.

settlement.title: Settle debt
settlement.description: Record a partial or full debt settlement from a live account surface.

budget.title: Set budget limit
budget.description: Create or update an expense budget rule for the active household.

auth.registerTitle: Create a household workspace without leaking tokens to the browser
auth.authDescription: This quick-start phase focuses on shell, routing, and typed boundaries. Auth screens are production-shaped and ready for BFF wiring in the next delivery step.
auth.bffReadyDescription: Form surfaces are ready for secure cookie session exchange and field-level validation.
auth.demoWorkspaceDescription: Use mocked household data to validate app shell, loading states, and route composition immediately.
auth.loginSub: Secure cookie session orchestration stays server-owned from the first submit.
auth.registerSub: Registration provisions an owner workspace and issues the session cookie from the server boundary.
auth.inspectShell: Need to inspect the product shell immediately? Login with the seeded mock account and continue with household-scoped demo data.
auth.signInDescription: The browser never stores raw session tokens.
auth.identityDescription: Owner access starts with an accountable member profile.
auth.credentialSetupDescription: The backend cookie boundary becomes the long-lived session owner.
auth.initialHouseholdDescription: Registration provisions the first owner-scoped workspace.

selection.title: Household-scoped entry
selection.heading: Choose the workspace that should anchor routing, permissions, and financial context.
selection.description: Every finance object in this product belongs to a household. This selection screen is the first tenant boundary and should survive refresh, deep links, and later auth/session enforcement.
selection.acceptRole: Accept role-scoped invites before entering the invited workspace.
selection.tenantAware: Tenant-aware dashboard with typed mock data
selection.serverRoutes: Server routes stay thin and household-aware.
selection.cookieSession: Cookie session stays server-owned and never enters local storage.
selection.mockMode: Mock mode is {status} for rapid verification.
selection.noHouseholdsDesc: Create the first workspace or accept an invite to continue.

createForm.title: Create household
createForm.description: Provision a new tenant-scoped workspace without leaving the secure selection shell.

inviteForm.title: Invite member
inviteForm.description: Provision a role-scoped household invite that can be accepted from the selection surface.

settings.title: {household} membership controls
settings.description: Access and invite management stay household-scoped, role-aware, and server-rendered by default.

invites.title: Pending and accepted invites
invites.description: Invites are normalized into typed UI models so future backend fields can be added without touching the page shell.
invites.emptyDescription: This household has not issued any role-scoped member invites.

actions.title: Role-aware actions
actions.description: Only owner and admin memberships can issue new invites.
actions.emptyDescription: Invite management is disabled for the current role.

common.limitedAvailability: This account currently has limited availability.

workspace.title: {household} account surfaces
workspace.description: Manage bank, card, and cash surfaces through focused dialogs while the workspace stays server-owned by default.
workspace.emptyDescription: Create the first household account to unlock balance, transfer, and budgeting workflows.
workspace.filteredEmptyDescription: Switch tabs or create another account to populate this slice.

portfolio.title: Portfolio posture
portfolio.description: A compact summary that can evolve into health, sync, and permission diagnostics.
portfolio.actionDescription: Create, detail, and edit flows live in dialogs so the workspace keeps a clean, card-driven scan path.

dialogs.createDescription: Add a new bank, card, or cash surface for this household.
dialogs.editDescription: Update account labels, availability state, and primary placement.
dialogs.detailsDescription: Review the current balance posture and availability state for this account.

setup.title: Account setup
setup.description: Account surfaces stay household-scoped and later sync metadata can attach without reshaping this form.

balance.title: Opening balance
balance.description: Balances are entered in decimal form and normalized to minor units before submit.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.description: Update labels, primary placement, and availability state without leaving the account workspace.

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: Archive or restrict accounts so downstream finance actions stay accurate.

workspace.title: Shareable activity workspace
workspace.description: Filters live in the URL while create and detail flows stay inside focused dialogs.

requirements.transferAccounts: Transfers require at least two active accounts.

feed.title: Transaction feed
feed.description: Mapped DTOs, normalized timestamps, and explicit money semantics keep the list safe for later mutations and analytics overlays.
feed.emptyTitle: No transactions match this filter set
feed.emptyDescription: Adjust the kind, period, or search term. Create flows remain available from the header.

expense.title: Record expense
expense.description: Book a household outflow from the activity workspace.

income.title: Record income
income.description: Capture a new inflow without leaving the transaction workspace.

transfer.title: Create transfer
transfer.description: Move household cash between active account surfaces.

dialogs.detailsDescription: Review normalized transaction metadata from the typed household ledger.

source.title: Transaction source
source.description: Choose where the household expense should be booked and categorized.

details.title: Expense details
details.description: Amounts are entered as decimals but submitted in backend-safe minor units.

note.label: Note
note.placeholder: Optional note for the household activity log

source.title: Income source
source.description: Select the receiving account and the source classification for this inflow.

details.title: Income details
details.description: Capture the amount, description, and occurred-at timestamp for the household ledger.

path.title: Transfer path
path.description: Move available balance between two active household account surfaces.

details.title: Transfer details
details.description: The current route will refresh after submit so account previews and recent activity stay aligned.

note.label: Note
note.placeholder: Reserve top-up for the next spending cycle

workspace.title: {household} category library
workspace.description: Create and edit household categories through focused dialogs while system defaults remain protected.

expense.title: Expense categories
expense.description: Used for spending capture, budgets, and analytics grouping.

income.title: Income categories
income.description: Used for inflow classification and summary reporting.

sections.emptyDescription: This category group has not been configured yet.

controls.title: Category controls
controls.description: Dialogs keep category mutations out of the reading path and preserve a calm workspace.
controls.tipViews: Expense and income libraries can be filtered through the tab controls above.
controls.tipSystemDefaults: System defaults stay read-only; only household custom categories expose edit actions.
controls.readOnlyDescription: This membership can review category mappings, but it cannot mutate them.

dialogs.createDescription: Add a household-scoped category without modifying system defaults.
dialogs.editDescription: Rename a household custom category while keeping its kind stable.

create.title: Create category
create.description: Household categories stay separate from system defaults and future backend conflicts are normalized at the boundary.

edit.title: Edit category
edit.description: Household categories stay separate from system defaults and future backend conflicts are normalized at the boundary.

workspace.title: {household} debt registry
workspace.description: Receivables and payables stay explicit while create, detail, and settlement flows remain dialog-driven.

requirements.createDebtBeforeSettlement: Create a debt before recording settlement.

ledger.title: Debt ledger
ledger.description: Outstanding balances remain visible until settlement reaches zero.
ledger.emptyDescription: Create a receivable or payable to start tracking settlements.

actionsPanel.title: Debt actions
actionsPanel.description: Dialogs keep settlement and detail flows available without crowding the registry.
actionsPanel.tipViews: Open, partial, and settled views are available through the tabs above.
actionsPanel.tipSettlement: Settlement stays disabled until at least one active account is available.
actionsPanel.readOnlyDescription: This membership can review debt records but cannot create or settle them.

dialogs.createDescription: Track a household payable or receivable.
dialogs.settleDescription: Record a partial or full settlement against a live account.
dialogs.detailsDescription: Review the remaining balance, status, and timing for this debt record.

counterparty.title: Counterparty
counterparty.description: Capture who owes the household or who the household needs to reimburse.

terms.title: Debt terms
terms.description: Use a due date if the settlement should be expected by a specific day.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Why this reimbursement or receivable exists

target.title: Settlement target
target.description: Choose an open or partially settled debt and record the movement through a live account.

details.title: Settlement details
details.description: Partial settlements are supported. Full settlement is detected automatically when the remaining amount reaches zero.

note.label: Note
note.placeholder: Optional settlement context for the household log

workspace.title: {household} budget controls
workspace.description: Budget limits stay dialog-driven, category-scoped, and period-aware for a low-noise planning workspace.

progress.title: Budget progress
progress.description: Spending stays anchored to minor-unit calculations and consistent category mapping.
progress.emptyTitle: No budgets configured for this view
progress.emptyDescription: Create a category limit to start tracking budget progress.

controls.title: Budget controls
controls.description: Use dialogs for create and edit flows so the reading path stays compact.
controls.tipViews: Weekly and monthly views are switchable through the tabs above.
controls.tipReuse: Reusing the same category and period updates the saved budget record.
controls.readOnlyDescription: This membership can review budgets but cannot change them.

dialogs.createDescription: Set a weekly or monthly cap for an expense category.
dialogs.editDescription: Adjust the saved period cap while keeping the existing category scope.

scope.title: Budget scope
scope.description: Budgets in this phase govern expense categories and can be updated by reusing the same category + period combination.

details.title: Budget details
details.description: Saving again with the same category and period updates the existing budget limit.

analytics.title: {household} financial signal
analytics.description: Summary cards, category concentration, and calendar intensity all read from the same server-owned transaction boundary.

trend.title: Flow trend
trend.description: Income and expense intensity over the selected period.

categories.title: Category concentration
categories.description: Top expense groups across the selected period.
categories.emptyDescription: Expense activity is required before category analytics can render.

calendar.title: Calendar intensity
calendar.description: Recent daily expense concentration for quick anomaly scanning.
calendar.emptyDescription: Analytics calendar will populate after household transactions arrive.

money.invalidAmount: Enter a valid amount with up to two decimal places.

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.letter: Password must contain at least one letter.
password.number: Password must contain at least one number.

fullName.min: Full name must be at least 2 characters.

name.min: Household name must be at least 2 characters.

email.invalid: Enter a valid invite email address.

maskedNumber.max: Use up to the last four digits.

disabledReason.required: Restricted accounts need a short reason.

transactions.accountsMustDiffer: Transfers must move between two different accounts.
transactions.crossCurrencyUnsupported: Cross-currency transfers will be supported in a later phase.

name.min: Category name must be at least 2 characters.

categoryId.required: Choose the category this budget should govern.

effectiveFrom.required: Choose when the budget becomes active.

counterpartyName.min: Enter the person or member name.

accountId.required: Choose the account used for settlement.

amount.exceedsRemaining: Settlement amount cannot exceed the remaining balance.

submission.conflict: The request conflicts with the current household state.
submission.generic: The form could not be submitted.

auth.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

permission.denied: You do not have permission to perform this action.

resource.notFound: The requested resource could not be found.
